name: Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
summary: A prompting technique and emergent capability where language models are encouraged to 'think step by step,' producing intermediate reasoning steps before arriving at a final answer. Chain-of-thought dramatically improves performance on math, logic, and complex reasoning tasks. It emerged as a capability of sufficiently large models and can be elicited through prompting (few-shot CoT) or trained directly into the model. Extended thinking and reasoning models represent the latest evolution of this concept.
query_hooks: Why does 'think step by step' work?
Can AI do math and logic?
